column1: Note: 1. Since 2011, collective economy and individual economy are no longer subdivided into urban and rural areas (same as the table below).

2. Starting from 2011, the statistical threshold for fixed asset investment projects was raised from 500,000 yuan to 5 million yuan, and the name was uniformly standardized as "Fixed Asset Investment," which includes urban and non-agricultural households' 5 million yuan.
